stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The trailing edge flaps are stuck in the position shown in the picture. What would the pilot have to do?

options.a: Trim ailerons to lower the left wing down and rudder to put the nose to the left.
options.b: Trim ailerons to lower the right wing down and rudder to put the nose to the left.
options.c: Trim ailerons to lower the left wing down and rudder to put the nose to the right.
options.d: Trim ailerons to lower the right wing down and rudder to put the nose to the right.
